mapper.sql: p.id, p.public_id::text AS publicKey, p.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, p.dicom_server_id AS dicomServerId, ds.public_id::text AS dicomServerPublicKey, ds.name AS dicomServerName, p.modality_id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityPublicKey, m.abbr AS modalityCode, m.name AS modalityName, p.retention_days AS retentionDays, p.notify_before_days AS notifyBeforeDays, p.require_approval AS requireApproval, p.enabled AS enabled, CASE WHEN p.hospital_id IS NULL AND p.dicom_server_id IS NULL AND p.modality_id IS NULL THEN 'Global default' ELSE CONCAT_WS(' / ', h.name, ds.name, COALESCE(NULLIF(m.abbr, ''), m.name)) END AS scopeLabel, p.notes, TO_CHAR(p.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(p.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS modifiedAt
FROM study_retention_policies p LEFT JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = p.hospital_id LEFT JOIN hospital_dicom_servers ds ON ds.id = p.dicom_server_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = p.modality_id
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM study_retention_policies WHERE is_active = 1 AND COALESCE(hospital_id, 0) = COALESCE(#{hospitalId}, 0) AND COALESCE(dicom_server_id, 0) = COALESCE(#{dicomServerId}, 0) AND COALESCE(modality_id, 0) = COALESCE(#{modalityId}, 0)
AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_retention_policies ( hospital_id, dicom_server_id, modality_id, retention_days, notify_before_days, require_approval, enabled, notes, is_active, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{request.hospitalId}, #{request.dicomServerId}, #{request.modalityId}, #{request.retentionDays}, #{request.notifyBeforeDays}, COALESCE(#{request.requireApproval}, TRUE), COALESCE(#{request.enabled}, TRUE), #{request.notes}, 1, #{userId}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE study_retention_policies SET hospital_id = #{request.hospitalId}, dicom_server_id = #{request.dicomServerId}, modality_id = #{request.modalityId}, retention_days = #{request.retentionDays}, notify_before_days = #{request.notifyBeforeDays}, require_approval = COALESCE(#{request.requireApproval}, TRUE), enabled = COALESCE(#{request.enabled}, TRUE), notes = #{request.notes}, modified_by = #{userId}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{request.id} AND is_active = 1

UPDATE study_retention_policies SET is_active = 2, enabled = FALSE, modified_by = #{userId}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1
AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId}

if.test: filter != null and filter.searchText != null and filter.searchText != ''

sql.if: AND ( COALESCE(patientName, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(patientMrn, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(accessionNumber, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(referenceVisitCode, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(studyInstanceUid, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(dicomServerName, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(modalityCode, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(modalityName, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' )

if.test: filter != null and filter.dicomServerId != null and filter.dicomServerId > 0
filter != null and filter.modalityId != null and filter.modalityId > 0
filter != null and filter.startDate != null and filter.startDate != ''

sql.if: AND CAST(expires_at_value AS DATE) >= CAST(#{filter.startDate} AS DATE)

if.test: filter != null and filter.endDate != null and filter.endDate != ''

sql.if: AND CAST(expires_at_value AS DATE) <= CAST(#{filter.endDate} AS DATE)

when.test: filter != null and filter.status != null and filter.status != ''

mapper.select:
WITH retention_rows AS (
) SELECT COUNT(1) FROM retention_rows WHERE status != 'DELETED'

WITH retention_rows AS (
) SELECT * FROM retention_rows WHERE studyId = #{studyId} AND status != 'DELETED' LIMIT 1

WITH retention_rows AS (
) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'NEAR_EXPIRY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::BIGINT AS nearExpiry, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'EXPIRED_WAITING_APPROVAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::BIGINT AS expiredWaitingApproval, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::BIGINT AS pendingApproval, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DELETE_FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::BIGINT AS deleteFailed, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::BIGINT AS rejected, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'KEEP_PERMANENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::BIGINT AS keepPermanent, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('NEAR_EXPIRY', 'EXPIRED_WAITING_APPROVAL', 'PENDING_APPROVAL', 'DELETE_FAILED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::BIGINT AS totalOpen FROM retention_rows WHERE status != 'DELETED'

INSERT INTO study_retention_delete_requests ( hospital_id, study_id, policy_id, dicom_server_id, modality_id, status, expires_at, near_expiry_at, study_instance_uid, dicom_server_study_id, accession_number, reference_visit_code, patient_mrn, patient_name, requested_by, requested_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{candidate.hospitalId}, #{candidate.studyId}, #{candidate.policyId}, #{candidate.dicomServerId}, #{candidate.modalityId}, 'PENDING_APPROVAL', CAST(#{candidate.expiresAt} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), CAST(#{candidate.nearExpiryAt} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), #{candidate.studyInstanceUid}, #{candidate.dicomServerStudyId}, #{candidate.accessionNumber}, #{candidate.referenceVisitCode}, #{candidate.patientMrn}, #{candidate.patientName}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() ) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE study_retention_delete_requests SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_by = #{userId}, approved_at = NOW(), decision_note = #{note}, error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId}
UPDATE study_retention_delete_requests SET status = #{status}, rejected_by = #{userId}, rejected_at = NOW(), decision_note = #{note}, error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId}
UPDATE study_retention_delete_requests SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), error_message = NULL WHERE id = #{requestId}
UPDATE study_retention_delete_requests SET status = 'DELETE_FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId}
